what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-12 in the design-source channel under recent-pitches/p-12; it references a JPEG blob and labels the asset as design ground-truth source material.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, width, height, source, author_session, created, and links fields
The body contains only a one-line caption: 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-12.jpg'
Width and height are both recorded as 0
The source field is 'design_source_material' and the author_session is 'ch-3mpkjg3r'
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image record
The asset is explicitly tagged as design ground-truth source material
It uses a blob://b2 URI and an image://design-source address scheme
No links or contextual relationships are recorded
conventions: Follows a YAML-frontmatter-plus-markdown-body ledger format for channel-memory assets
Uses a structured address (image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-12) and a blob reference
Records provenance fields such as author_session and created timestamp
concerns: Recording zero width and height for a JPEG asset may indicate missing image analysis or ingestion failure
The file provides almost no descriptive context beyond the caption
No links connect this asset to related pitches, designs, or concepts
notes: A minimal provenance stub for a design-source pitch image that references a JPEG blob but lacks dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What does the blob://b2 URI resolve to and where is it stored?
Does 'p-12' refer to a page, slide, or pitch identifier?
What specific pitch or design concept is this image ground truth for?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design ground-truth source image; this matches, although the zero dimensions and empty links mean it functions as an under-populated metadata stub.
apparent_themes: Addressable media references in a ledger
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to make a visual design source discoverable and attributable within a channel-memory system, anchoring it as ground truth for downstream design work.
novelty: The combination of an image:// channel address, a blob://b2 storage reference, and an explicit 'design ground-truth' label in a sparse metadata record.
contribution: Provides an addressable, timestamped, authorship-linked metadata record for a design-source image asset and a stable blob reference, supporting retrieval and provenance tracking in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the design-source image asset recent-pitches/p-12, referencing a JPEG blob, marked as design ground-truth, with zero width/height and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make addressable a source image used as ground truth in recent pitches.
